description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a slightly domed top. The extinguisher features a prominent black discharge horn attached to a curved metal tube, which is connected to the valve assembly at the top. The valve assembly includes a red lever handle and a side-mounted adjustment knob, both made of metal. The body surface appears slightly worn, with some subtle scuff marks, indicating prior handling or use. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible labels or signage, and the extinguisher is free-standing without any mounting bracket. The black discharge horn is large and conical, designed for directing the extinguishing agent effectively.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a large black discharge horn, red lever handle, and metal valve assembly. The surface is slightly worn and there are no visible labels or mounting brackets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black discharge horn centered and extending downward, with the red handle and adjustment knob visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metal tube connecting the horn to the body, and the red lever handle in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red cylindrical body and the back of the valve assembly, with no horn visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the black discharge horn and the red lever handle from a different angle.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A large black conical discharge horn is attached to a curved metal tube at the top, extending outward and downward.
